case_title: JUSTO REYES VS. MAIN O GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY REYES, JUSTO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MAIN O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTIONOF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAY-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MAIN O

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARTA RISEN. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---EVELYN LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, JUSTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MAIN O $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
